---
title: "Week 9: Spring Break"
subtitle: "No Reading Assigned"
date: "2026-03-17"
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
---

## Spring Break

No readings, assignments, or class meetings this week. Rest, recharge, and come back ready for the second half of the semester.

If you want to get ahead, consider:

- Reviewing your immersion memos and variable definitions from Weeks 7–8
- Organizing your Obsidian vault notes
- Starting to draft your codebook based on the definitions practice
